title: oberonia obcordata
intro: Oberonia obcordata, also known as the Orange Oberonia or Oberonia, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Oberonia obcordata include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve circulation, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of Oberonia obcordata can be made by infusing the plant in hot water or using it in a tincture, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
